clause: A corporation's carbon emissions per facility must not exceed 1000 tons per calendar year.
All individuals wishing to access the national digital portal must be at least 18 years of age at the time of registration.
Every digital transaction must be recorded with an invoice if it uses recognized currency.
Personal data may only be transferred to jurisdictions that offer an equivalent level of data protection.
All electronic goods must come with a minimum manufacturer's warranty of one year.
A domestic controller is responsible for the secure storage and handling of personal data.
Transactions conducted via loyalty points are exempt from digital transaction tax.
A facility is defined as a single industrial site owned or operated by a corporation.
Any person who voluntarily causes hurt shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year.
A public servant who accepts a bribe shall be liable for prosecution under the Prevention of Corruption Act.
Companies must appoint at least one woman director on their board if their turnover exceeds 300 crore rupees.
Intermediaries must remove unlawful content within 36 hours of receiving a government order.
E-commerce platforms are prohibited from selling products from vendors in which they have an equity interest.
Income tax is applicable on all global income for individuals who are residents in India for more than 182 days.
Retailers must display the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) inclusive of all taxes on every product package.
Any digital signature used for legal purposes must be issued by a licensed Certifying Authority.
The CSR committee shall consist of three or more directors, out of which at least one director shall be an independent director.
No child under the age of 14 years shall be employed to work in any factory or mine or engaged in any other hazardous employment.
Speculative transactions involving commodities are subject to Commodity Transaction Tax unless they are delivery-based.
Data fiduciaries must obtain explicit consent from the data principal before processing sensitive personal data.
